errorText: VS Code installation fails with 'Error 1603: A fatal error occurred during installation.'
solution: This usually happens when a previous VS Code installation wasn't fully removed. Uninstall any existing version via Control Panel > Programs, delete leftover folders in %APPDATA%\Code and %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\Microsoft VS Code, then re-run the installer.

errorText: VS Code opens but extensions fail to install with a network error.
solution: This is often caused by a proxy or firewall blocking the Marketplace. Go to File > Preferences > Settings, search for 'proxy', and configure your proxy URL, or temporarily disable your firewall to confirm the cause.

errorText: Figma desktop app shows a blank white screen after launch.
solution: This is typically a GPU rendering issue. Close Figma, then relaunch it while holding Ctrl to disable hardware acceleration, or update your graphics drivers to the latest version.

errorText: Discord gets stuck at 'Checking for updates' on launch.
solution: Close Discord completely via Task Manager, then delete the contents of %APPDATA%\Discord (this does not delete your account or messages, only cached app files), and relaunch Discord to trigger a clean update.

errorText: Installer says 'This app can't run on your PC'.
solution: This means the installer doesn't match your system architecture. Check whether you downloaded the 32-bit or 64-bit version, and confirm your Windows version by going to Settings > System > About, then download the matching installer.
